component.name: Goverlay
component.summary: Easily configure MangoHud, vkBasalt and OptiScaler

description.p: Goverlay is an easy graphical interface to configure MangoHud, vkBasalt, and OptiScaler. Goverlay helps Linux gamers get the most out of their systems by providing an easy-to-use graphical interface to configure MangoHud, vkBasalt, and OptiScaler. Whether you're looking for performance monitoring, visual enhancements, or smarter upscaling, Goverlay makes everything accessible in just a few clicks.

screenshot.caption: Performance section to configure fps,frame time..
Metrics section to configure CPU and GPU stats.
Extra goodies like distro info, wine version..

ul.li: Unified the OptiScaler UI layout between Stable and Bleeding-edge channels
Resolved UI freezes and deadlocks during startup (changelog fetching and fallback cover generation)
Updated FSR Stable fallback version string to 4.1.1
Added option to select a preferred upscaler in the OptiScaler tab
Implemented a persistent power monitoring fix for Intel CPUs
Added Vulkan Low Latency layer (Korthos) integration
Support for creating and launching Steam game shortcuts
Enabled navigation sidebar toggles in global configuration mode
Synchronize configuration files (OptiScaler.ini, fakenvapi.ini) dynamically on game launch
Support for AppImage game detection and custom covers
Improved settings menu visual structure with separators
Corrected configuration path resolution under Flatpak using XDG_CONFIG_HOME
Fixed config resets and parser bugs in OptiScaler settings
Ignore crash/bug report folders during Unreal Engine game searches
Fixed StartupWMClass in desktop configuration
Preserved active tool environment variables (MangoHud, OptiScaler) when tweaks/envvars are saved or toggled off
Added full backup, cleanup, and restoration support for d3d12.dll proxies
Added floating action button (FAB) to game cards for quick options, replacing the right-click context menu
Added asynchronous frameless release notes ("What's New") popup showing latest changelog
Support for user nicknames and leaderboard benchmark submissions
Support for game-specific custom MangoHud preset loading
Modernized UI scrollbars across all tabs with thin semitransparent styling
Isolated DLL backups outside of the game directories to prevent corruption
Isolated global profile configurations to gameconfig/global/
Improved Steam library scans with multi-CDN fallbacks and web search for covers
Clean up overlay files and wrapper DLLs on game uninstall while preserving native platform badges
Prevented infinite mouse wheel scrolling past bottom in tweaks and vkbasalt tabs
Fixed OptiScaler version persistence and correct INT8 DLL copying on update
Implemented dynamic GPU 360p fallback on low framerate to prevent system crashes
vkSumi integration with automated configuration generation and environment management
Renamed "Proton Tweaks" tab to "EnvVars" and added latency reduction tweaks
Added support for custom non-Steam games with asynchronous cover art downloading and right-click removal
Bundle vkSumi and Nerd Fonts dependencies in GOverlay AppImage
UI/UX modernization using theme-aware layouts for light themes and custom cards for vkBasalt, OptiScaler, vkSumi, and MangoHud
Standardized Flatpak host configuration path resolution for MangoHud and GOverlay
X11 right-modifier detection and layout reflow logic improvements
Added configuration version check and automated migration prompt on startup
Corrected OptiScaler shortcut and scale values loading from the correct section
Fixed Tweaks tab checkbox mappings and simplified loading logic
Preserve existing global fgmod script on startup and fixed default environment variables state
Prevented cover download thread deadlocks and fixed path quoting for non-Steam games
Renamed the vkSumi configuration environment variable to VKSUMI_CONFIG_FILE
Add "Clear configuration" button to the System card
Migrate vkBasalt ReShade effects to MD3-style toggle list
Ensure DLSS version persistence in global configuration
Resolve Steam games and icon loading for Flatpak/system installs
Relocated Flatpak build scripts and clean up unused code
Modernized sidebar with clean nav rail design and collapsable animation
Brand new resizable main window and Steam games tab with cover art and search
Fully per-game configuration support with environment variables and covers
Added new System information card to the Home tab
Redesigned vkBasalt, OptiScaler, Presets, and MangoHud tabs with modern dark card layouts
Improved Flatpak pathing and Steam prefix detection
Protontricks Windows version manager with Flatpak support
NVIDIA DLSS file downloader
Custom X and Y offset configurations for overlay placement
FSR4 Update configuration for OptiScaler
Modern Design System with toast notifications, search functionality, and status bar
Dynamic Theme application to multiple forms and controls
Redesigned OptiScaler UI layout with Wine prefix icon
Adjusted default active tab for quicker access
FakeNVAPI Reflex configuration persistence
OptiScaler settings correctly scoped to [Menu] section
Accurate identification of GPUs in graphics device detection
Improved FGMod copy logic for nvngx files
OptiPatcher support with automatic version detection
OptiPatcher "Games supported" label added
Fixed vkBasalt shader path for Flatpak
RADV_DEBUG=nofastclears option for AMD GPU debugging
Force Zink checkbox with smart GPU detection
Helpful tooltips on all FGMOD Tweaks checkboxes
GameMode warning dialog for Flatpak users
Improved path handling and manifest cleanup
Fixed OptiScaler path issue in Flatpak
Reverted Flatpak paths for fgmod/nohup to standard sandbox paths
Implemented "Save as" funcionality for MangoHud and vkBasalt, now you can create different configs for each game.
Fixed games that keep running on steam after quiting. Thanks @8Vinso8 for the help diagnosing the problem inside FGMOD !
Easy folder selection dialog
Export configs to any directory you choose
Zero hassle setup! OptiScaler now installs automatically for FGMOD
This release brings full XDG Base Directory specification compliance, ensuring GOverlay follows Linux standards for configuration and data storage.
Fixed process tracking for Steam integration
Properly handles argument separator
